chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3738 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَيُّمَا مُسْلِمٍ أَقَالَ مُسْلِماً نَدَامَةً فِي اَلْبَيْعِ أَقَالَهُ اَللَّهُ عَثْرَتَهُ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3738 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Any Muslim who cancels a sale for another Muslim who regrets it, Allah (swt) will cancel his slip on the Day of Judgment."
